sglang.title: Time cost utils
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This PR introduces --show-cost-time server argument and change the cost time mark style.

vllm.title: [Core] separate distributed_init from worker
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, distributed_init is coupled with worker, e.g. it requires a parallel_config, and only works with gpu backend (nccl).
This PR is the first step to refactor distributed_init, to make it general (only depends on CPU and does not need any vllm internal types).
This way, distributed_init can b

vllm.title: [Misc] [Core] Implement RFC "Augment BaseExecutor interfaces to enable hardware-agnostic speculative decoding"
vllm.author: cadedaniel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements the BaseWorker interface described in #3809. This enables speculative decoding to treat all workers in the same way, allowing future work to enable speculative decoding for CPU/Neuron/other vLLM backends.
I will write up docs on how to do this after spec decode is merged; the TL;D

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix KeyError on loading GPT-NeoX
vllm.author: jsato8094
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This small PR, like #1978, solves the problem of loading GPT-NeoX model parameters into the vLLM, which causes a KeyError due to the presence of rotary_emb.cos_cached and rotary_emb.sin_cached.
We noticed this problem when we loaded GPT-NeoX model fine-tuned with OpenRLHF.
This implementation is the

vllm.title: [ROCm][Hardware][AMD] Use Triton Kernel for default FA on ROCm
vllm.author: jpvillam-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR creates and makes default new triton exclusive backend for attention. Additionally removes some unsupported arguments from AMD's version of the flash_attn_varlen_func function.

Changed selector to allow picking between multiple backends rather than just between two.
